title: euclea polyandra
intro: Euclea polyandra, also known as the "tree of heaven," is a small tree or shrub native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Euclea polyandra are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, as well as potentially reducing the risk of certain diseases such as cancer and diabetes. Euclea polyandra can be prepared as an herbal remedy in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although its safety and efficacy have not been extensively scientifically studied.
